name: Kasespatzle (Spaetzle Cheese Noodles)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat butter in a frying pan over medium heat.
2. Add onions and brown lightly.
3. Toss the grated Emmenthaler cheese with dry mustard.
4. Add cooked spaetzle noodles to the pan with onions and cheese; mix well.
5. Transfer the mixture into an ovenproof casserole dish.
6. Bake at 300 degrees F (150 degrees C) for 20 to 30 minutes, or until hot and bubbly.
7. Sprinkle chopped chives on top before serving.
